config.prompt: Use the AskUserQuestion tool to ask me which programming language I prefer. Provide these options: TypeScript, Python, Rust. Do nothing else after I answer.

questions.question: Which programming language do you prefer?

options.label: TypeScript
options.description: Statically-typed JavaScript superset, great for web and full-stack development.

options.label: Python
options.description: Versatile, readable language popular for scripting, data, and ML.

options.label: Rust
options.description: Systems language with memory safety and high performance.
